description: This file provides utility functions to generate versioned HTML attributes for including Bootstrap CSS and JS files, with environment-specific modifications such as minification and integrity hashes.

methods.name: getVersionedBsCssProps
methods.description: Generates HTML link attributes for including a versioned Bootstrap CSS file, with support for RTL and environment-specific minification and integrity hash.

methods.name: getVersionedBsJsProps
methods.description: Generates HTML script attributes for including a versioned Bootstrap JS bundle, with environment-specific minification and integrity hash.
